name: task-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration driven by a pipeline.yml: semantic task groups with cross-group concurrency, fork coders, and per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5 added P2-1 feedback loop (resolve ingests case/pitfall yml into <project_root>/.ai-memory/knowledge/). v0.6 adds twin md output under <project_root>/knowledge-base/cases/ + pitfalls/ — same stems as the yml; preserves narrative for future embedding indexer.
